================================================================================

 MOHAMED FEKRI SAID SOLIMAN
AI-Driven HR, Business Intelligence & Healthcare Digital Transformation Leader   | Oracle HCM Cloud | Power BI | Workforce Analytics | Executive Decision Intelligence
📍 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia 📧 fikry33471@gmail.com | 📱 +966-591412726
EXECUTIVE PROFILE
Strategic and results-driven Digital Transformation & Business Intelligence Leader with over 16 years of experience in the healthcare sector.
Expert in leveraging AI, Business Intelligence, and Oracle HCM Cloud to drive enterprise performance, optimize workforce cost, and enable data-driven executive decision-making.
Proven ability to transform HR and operations into high-impact, insight-led functions, delivering measurable improvements in efficiency, financial performance, and organizational agility.
Recognized for bridging the gap between data, strategy, and execution at the C-suite level.
CORE EXPERTISE
Business Intelligence & Data-Driven Decision Making 
AI-Driven Workforce Analytics & Predictive Modeling 
Oracle HCM Cloud Implementation & Integration 
Executive Dashboarding (Power BI) & Data Visualization

Strategic Planning & Enterprise Performance 
AI Governance, Risk & Compliance 

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Al-Taiwan Investment Group – Riyadh | 2023 – Present
Advise executive leadership on enterprise digital transformation, AI adoption, and BI strategy 
Designed and implemented data-driven performance frameworks, enhancing strategic execution 
Led deployment of AI-powered analytics solutions, improving decision accuracy and forecasting 
Delivered executive dashboards and decision intelligence tools supporting high-impact investments 

Business Planning & Performance Management Analyst
Saudi German Hospital – Riyadh | 2022 – Present
                  AI-Driven Strategy, Business Intelligence & Oracle HCM
Architected enterprise-wide BI-driven strategic planning frameworks integrating Oracle HCM, financial, and operational data 
Designed predictive KPI ecosystems using Power BI and Oracle HCM analytics, enabling real-time executive decisions 
Delivered C-level dashboards improving performance visibility across HR, finance, and operations 

Business Intelligence, Data Analytics & Decision Intelligence
Built and scaled enterprise Business Intelligence solutions (Power BI) integrated with Oracle HCM 
Analyzed large-scale workforce and financial datasets, identifying critical cost optimization opportunities 
Developed interactive dashboards and data models, enabling real-time monitoring of KPIs and performance 
Applied predictive analytics and variance analysis, improving forecasting accuracy and strategic planning 

Digital Transformation & Intelligent Automation
Led end-to-end HR digital transformation initiatives using Oracle HCM Cloud, AI, and RPA 
Re-engineered HR processes through data-driven workflow optimization, reducing inefficiencies 
Implemented automated BI reporting ecosystems, significantly reducing manual effort and reporting delays 

HR Analytics & Strategic Business Impact
Developed advanced workforce analytics models, optimizing staffing, productivity, and cost structures 
Enabled data-driven HR decision-making through BI dashboards and AI-powered insights 
Delivered executive insights linking HR metrics (Headcount, Staff Cost, Productivity) to financial performance 
Positioned HR as a strategic contributor to profitability and operational efficiency 

HR Supervisor
Saudi German Hospital – Riyadh | 2011 – 2022
Managed payroll, compensation, and workforce lifecycle operations 
Ensured compliance with Saudi labor laws, GOSI, and Saudization regulations 
Led HR governance aligned with JCI & CBAHI standards 
Improved HR performance through data tracking, reporting, and process optimization

_________________________________________________________________________________________ Career Summary: 
Strategic Digital Transformation Executive with 16+ years of leadership experience driving AI-enabled enterprise performance and workforce optimization within complex healthcare environments. Recognized for integrating advanced analytics, enterprise HR systems, and predictive performance architectures to strengthen operational efficiency, financial discipline, and executive decision-making. Globally certified (PMP, SHRM-SCP, SPHRI™), with a proven ability to reposition HR as a data-driven strategic value creator aligned with long-term growth and organizational resilience.

Organization : Al-Taiwan Investment Group , Riyadh, Saudi Arabia – Part Time
Duration  :  Jun 2023 – Present
Position    : Executive Advisor & Director of Strategic Planning & Digital Transformation (Consultant)
Advise the CEO on group-wide strategic initiatives and lead digital transformation roadmaps.
Deploy AI-driven analytics and technology solutions to optimize investment processes and performance.

Organization : Saudi German Hospital, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia – Full Time
Duration  :  April 2022 – Present 
Position    : Business Planning & Performance Management Analyst

AI-Driven Strategic Planning

Led the development and execution of AI-enhanced strategic business plans, ensuring seamless alignment with corporate objectives and future-focused goals.
Designed predictive KPIs powered by generative AI, delivering real-time performance dashboards for C-level executives to drive strategic decisions.
Conducted advanced market and competitive analysis using AI-driven tools to identify emerging trends and inform proactive strategies.
Collaborated cross-functionally to synchronize departmental plans with organizational priorities, leveraging AI for optimized alignment.

Predictive Performance Management

Engineered AI-enhanced KPIs to monitor and forecast organizational performance, enabling proactive optimization.
Delivered dynamic performance reports and interactive dashboards using advanced data visualization tools for senior leadership.
Conducted predictive variance analysis with AI models to uncover performance trends and provide strategic recommendations.

Advanced Data Analytics & Decision Intelligence

Processed and analyzed large-scale datasets with AI tools to identify trends, opportunities, and risks, driving data-informed strategies.
Utilized generative AI and visualization platforms (e.g., Power BI) to present complex insights in clear, actionable formats for stakeholders.
Prepared comprehensive, AI-generated reports and presentations to support strategic initiatives and executive decision-making.

Intelligent Process Optimization

Identified operational inefficiencies using AI-driven process mining and analytics, prioritizing areas for automation and improvement.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement AI-powered process enhancements, including robotic process automation (RPA), to boost efficiency.
Monitored and refined implemented changes with real-time AI feedback loops, ensuring sustained performance gains and adaptability.

AI-Enabled Decision Support

Provided AI-augmented analytical support to business leaders, leveraging predictive models to enhance strategic decision-making.
Conducted ad-hoc analyses using generative AI to address emerging business challenges and support innovative initiatives.
Fostered cross-departmental collaboration by sharing AI-driven insights, ensuring cohesive, data-backed strategies across the organization.

Employee Experience & AI-Personalized Engagement

Designed AI-driven employee engagement programs, utilizing generative AI to create personalized recognition and wellness initiatives, boosting morale and productivity.
Implemented real-time feedback systems powered by AI to enhance employee experience and foster a positive, inclusive workplace culture.

Regulatory Compliance & Ethical AI Governance

Ensured compliance with global standards (e.g., JCI, CBAHI) by integrating ethical AI frameworks into business processes.
Developed governance models to mitigate risks associated with AI deployment, ensuring transparency, fairness, and accountability.

AI-Enabled HR Risk Management

Leveraged AI to predict and mitigate HR-related risks, including workforce stability and compliance issues, through predictive analytics and scenario modeling.
Streamlined HR risk management processes with AI-driven insights, ensuring ethical decision-making and alignment with organizational objectives.

Organization : Saudi German Hospital, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia – Full Time
Duration  :  Jan 2011  – April 2022 
Position    : HR Supervisor

During my work in SGH, I gained experience in the following HR Functions:
Compensation & Benefits: 
Responsible for overseeing Payroll related functions
Preparing, assessing, and facilitating staff contract renewal on a monthly basis. 
Monitoring staff life cycle transactions and controlling their compensations as per hospital policy. • Facilitating staff welfare benefits. In addition to other benefits for staff death and disability cases. 
Handles day-to-day operations and inquiry for staff
Governmental Relations
Handles communication in relation to governmental offices such as GOSI, Ministry of Labour, HRDF, Chamber of Commerce, Ministry of Foreign Affairs
Monitors validity of work permits for hospital staff
Responsible for maintaining high level of Saudization in accordance with governmental requirements
Governance & Compliance: 
In charge of all staff licenses such as SCFHS, MOH, Baladiya, SCE, and SOCPA
Maintaining validity of Hospital License and ensures its renewed regularly
Monitoring HR Performance in align with JCI & CBAHI standards. 
Talent Acquisition: 
Conducting recruitment process and maintaining eligible applicant pool. 
Granting employee value proposition thought the recruitment process. 
Staff Experience and Internal Communications:
In charge of boosting employees’ morale by arranging staff activities
Handles staff recognition programs such as employee of the month, outstanding employee awards and on-the-spot awards
Creates a monthly HR Employee Magazine that highlights staff activities and recognition
